title: ichnocarpus volubilis
intro: Ichnocarpus volubilis, also known as the Convolvulus or Morning Glory, is a perennial climber with vine-like growth habit and small white or pink flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and various skin conditions. The health benefits of Ichnocarpus volubilis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Ichnocarpus volubilis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
